critique.primary_failure: Main Number M3+ consistent negative edge across all time windows.
critique.special_number_decay: Observed SHORT_MOMENTUM pattern. 150-draw edge (+49.3%) evaporated to 1500-draw edge (+1.6%). Unreproducible Alpha.
methodology_errors: Lack of statistical rigor (no z-score or permutation tests).
Empty '3-Bet Coverage' claims without proper 11.17% random baseline comparison.

lessons_learned: Cold-rebound clusters (Gap Pressure) lack simultaneous occurrence probability. Forcing co-occurrence on long-overdue numbers creates a negative-sum selection bias.
